HSBC Just Built a Bridge to #Bitcoin & #XRP #shorts HSBC Orion is live. It's a digital asset platform that issues bonds and gold tokens on-chain. This isn't a pilot. It's infrastructure built for institutional custody. Ripple acquired Metaco for this exact use case. Now HSBC is using it to connect public and private blockchains. That means Bitcoin, XRP, Ethereum—everything. Traditional banks are building the on-ramps. Gold tokens. Bonds. Cross-chain settlement. All happening in Luxembourg, right now. This is how tokenization scales. Not through hype. Through infrastructure. Not financial advice. 🔖 Hashtags #crypto #tokenization #hsbc #xrp #ripple #bitcoin #digitalassets #defi #blockchain #custody #gold #shorts
